mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 111 > npcs > COMBAT INITIATIVE During turn; characters' phases are performed
mechanics.excerpt: COMBAT INITIATIVE During turn; characters' phases are performed in cer- tain order; The process of determining the order which phas- es are executed called Initiative. At the beginning of each turn; every character rolls 2010 and adds his RFL Attribute to the result: The total is his Initiative score .
